experiments.note: DeepSeek-R1 explored 7 different action types vs Qwen-7B's 1

conclusion: DeepSeek-R1 is significantly smarter than Qwen-7B — chose 7 different action types, autonomously searched/downloaded external models, decided when to stop. Precision still bottlenecked by label noise, not Brain intelligence.
